title: Battery maker Enovix planning $1.2B factory in Malaysia
text: Enovix's Fab2 is a high-volume production facility in Penang, Malaysia, with a grand opening held on August 8, 2024. The total investment planned is $1.2 billion, and the facility is located in an existing YBS building at the Penang Science Park. At full capacity, the new manufacturing line will be able to produce nine to 12 million batteries a year, and the facility will house up to four lines. The Gen2 Autoline represents a step-change improvement in manufacturing with up to 10x faster throughput relative to the Gen1 production line. When fully ramped, Gen2 Line 1 will have the capacity to produce more than nine million batteries annually. Enovix completed Site Acceptance Testing (SAT) for its High Volume Manufacturing (HVM) line at Fab2 in Malaysia in late December 2024, which is a critical step toward enabling Fab2 to begin mass production in 2025.
